name: Old Fashioned Graham Flour Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Add all ingredients in the order listed into the bread machine or a large mixing bowl.
2. If using a bread machine, select the white bread setting and press "Start".
3. If mixing by hand, stir until a dough forms.
4. Knead the dough on a lightly floured surface for about 5 minutes.
5. Place the dough into two equal portions and shape each into a loaf.
6. Place the shaped loaves into small loaf pans and cover.
7. Let the dough rise in a warm place until it has doubled in size, about 45 minutes to 1 hour.
8. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C).
9. Bake for 35-40 minutes, or until golden brown and sounds hollow when tapped on the bottom.
